fields.Name: T23 - Handle Invalid Navigation Gracefully
fields.Description: Attempts to navigate to a non-existent entity or URL path and verifies the application handles it gracefully without crashing.

InputDefinition.goal:
IMPORTANT ENVIRONMENT NOTE: This application runs in a resource-constrained Docker environment and may take 10-30 seconds to load pages, initialize the workspace, or complete navigation transitions. If you see a loading screen, spinner, or blank page — DO NOT navigate away, go back, refresh, or retry login. Simply wait with increasing intervals (5s, then 10s, then 15s) until the content appears. The application WILL load; it just needs time. Only request judgement if you have waited over 60 seconds total on the same loading state with no change.

Navigate the browser to an invalid URL path like http://localhost:4200/app/nonexistent/invalid-path. Verify that the application handles this gracefully by showing an error page, a 'not found' message, or redirecting to a valid page. The application should NOT show a blank white screen or crash.

judgeValidationCriteria: User navigated to an invalid/nonexistent path
Application displayed an error page or redirected gracefully
Application did NOT show a blank white screen or crash
